mapper.sql: select distinct t.task_id, t.task_no, t.task_name, t.task_scope_type, t.task_status, t.target_dept_id, t.target_location_id, t.target_category_id, t.plan_start_time, t.plan_end_time, t.owner_user_id, t.execute_user_id, t.summary_total, t.summary_ok, t.summary_diff, t.status, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from asset_inventory_task t left join asset_location scope_location on scope_location.location_id = t.target_location_id left join sys_dept scope_dept on scope_dept.dept_id = ifnull(t.target_dept_id, scope_location.dept_id) left join sys_user scope_user on scope_user.user_id = t.owner_user_id

select i.item_id, i.task_id, i.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, i.expected_user_id, expected_user.nick_name as expected_user_name, i.actual_user_id, actual_user.nick_name as actual_user_name, i.expected_location_id, expected_location.location_name as expected_location_name, i.actual_location_id, actual_location.location_name as actual_location_name, i.expected_status, i.actual_status, i.inventory_result, i.inventory_desc, i.inventory_time, i.inventory_user_id, inventory_user.nick_name as inventory_user_name, i.process_status, i.process_desc from asset_inventory_task_item i left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = i.asset_id left join sys_user expected_user on expected_user.user_id = i.expected_user_id left join sys_user actual_user on actual_user.user_id = i.actual_user_id left join sys_user inventory_user on inventory_user.user_id = i.inventory_user_id left join asset_location expected_location on expected_location.location_id = i.expected_location_id left join asset_location actual_location on actual_location.location_id = i.actual_location_id
mapper.select: where i.task_id = #{taskId} order by i.item_id asc

select i.item_id, i.task_id, i.asset_id, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, i.expected_user_id, expected_user.nick_name as expected_user_name, a.current_user_id as actual_user_id, actual_user.nick_name as actual_user_name, i.expected_location_id, expected_location.location_name as expected_location_name, a.current_location_id as actual_location_id, actual_location.location_name as actual_location_name, i.expected_status, a.asset_status as actual_status, i.inventory_result, i.inventory_desc, i.inventory_time, i.inventory_user_id, inventory_user.nick_name as inventory_user_name, i.process_status, i.process_desc from asset_inventory_task_item i left join asset_info a on a.asset_id = i.asset_id left join sys_user expected_user on expected_user.user_id = i.expected_user_id left join sys_user actual_user on actual_user.user_id = a.current_user_id left join sys_user inventory_user on inventory_user.user_id = i.inventory_user_id left join asset_location expected_location on expected_location.location_id = i.expected_location_id left join asset_location actual_location on actual_location.location_id = a.current_location_id where i.task_id = #{taskId} and (a.asset_code = #{scanCode} or a.qr_code = #{scanCode}) limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into asset_inventory_task_item ( task_id, asset_id, expected_user_id, actual_user_id, expected_location_id, actual_location_id, expected_status, actual_status, inventory_result, inventory_desc, inventory_time, inventory_user_id, process_status, process_desc ) values
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.assetId}, #{item.expectedUserId}, #{item.actualUserId}, #{item.expectedLocationId}, #{item.actualLocationId}, #{item.expectedStatus}, #{item.actualStatus}, #{item.inventoryResult}, #{item.inventoryDesc}, #{item.inventoryTime}, #{item.inventoryUserId}, #{item.processStatus}, #{item.processDesc} )
mapper.update: update asset_inventory_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId}

update asset_inventory_task set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where task_id in
#{taskId}
